title: Issue with apostrophe in app name
excerpt:
Hi team, 
Our app name is Bird’s eye view . 
When a user installs the app, the upgrade alert shows up as below 
 
Can this be fixed? Thank you.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @kranthi_thoughtflow,

Can you please send this over to appsupport@monday.com so we can take this as a ticket and open a report for our team to fix this?

Looking forward to hearing from you via email!

Cheers,
Matias
